news.summary: Perma-Pipe International Holdings, Inc. disclosed today that David Mansfield will step down as Chief Executive Officer on June 7, 2025. The company, traded on Nasdaq under PPIH, appointed Saleh Sagr as the new President and CEO in conjunction with Mansfield's departure. Jerome T. Walker, the Chairman of the Board, expressed gratitude to Mansfield for his contributions to Perma-Pipe.
news.headline: Perma-Pipe International Holdings, Inc. CEO David Mansfield departs, Saleh Sagr appointed as new CEO effective June 7, 2025.
WSJ: ISRAELI OFFICIAL WARNED THAT A STRIKE COULD COME AS SOON AS SUNDAY UNLESS IRAN AGREES TO HALT PRODUCTION OF FISSILE MATERIAL

news.summary: In a gathering held at Baltimore Unity Hall on June 3, 2025, more than 250 community members, leaders, and mentors participated in the Baltimore Children & Youth Fund's (BCYF) second annual Community Exhibition. This event served as a platform to celebrate the accomplishments and contributions of the city's youth.
news.headline: 250 attendees gathered for Baltimore Children & Youth Fund's Community Exhibition, showcasing youth nonprofits impact in the community.

news.summary: On May 3, 2025, D-MARKET Electronic Services & Trading, operating as "Hepsiburada" and listed on NASDAQ under HEPS, revealed the fourth bond issuance by its subsidiary Hepsi Finansman A.Ş. The nominal value of this issuance stands at TRY 66,950,000.
news.headline: Hepsiburada's subsidiary Hepsifinans issues fourth bond worth TRY 66,950,000, strengthening e-commerce platform.

news.summary: This press release is not intended for distribution to U.S. newswire services or for dissemination within the United States.
news.headline: Atrium Mortgage Investment Corp announces $30M public offering of debentures, not for distribution in the US.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the country's GDP grew by 5% in the last quarter, surpassing analyst expectations of 4.5%. Unemployment rates also fell to 3.8%, the lowest in the past decade. Additionally, the stock market index hit a record high of 30,000 points. Experts believe that these positive economic indicators signal a robust recovery for the nation's economy.
news.headline: Roquette reveals new structure after acquiring IFF Pharma Solutions.

news.summary: LyondellBasell revealed today that its subsidiary, LYB International Finance III, LLC, has priced a public offering of $500,000,000 aggregate principal amount of 6.150% Guaranteed Notes due 2035. These Notes, which will be backed by LyondellBasell, are set to be fully and unconditionally guaranteed. The Offering is scheduled to conclude on May 15, 2025, pending the fulfillment of standard closing requirements.
news.headline: LyondellBasell priced public offering of $500M 6.150% Guaranteed Notes due 2035 through its subsidiary.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, in Hamilton, Bermuda, DHT Holdings, Inc. disclosed the outcomes of its 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, which took place on June 11, 2025. The company, listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol DHT, shared the highlights from the Annual Meeting.
news.headline: DHT Holdings, Inc. shares 2025 Annual Meeting results, held on June 11, 2025. Key information undisclosed.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in Toronto, it was reported that all per share values mentioned were provided on a diluted basis.
news.headline: Guardian Capital Group (TSX: GCG; GCG.A) releases 2025 Q1 results in Toronto. Per share figures are on diluted basis.

news.summary: Calgary, Alberta-based Avenue Living disclosed today the successful completion of an offering of $250 million in Series A senior unsecured notes. These Notes are set to mature on May 12, 2030, and were made available through a private placement method in various Canadian provinces. RBC Capital Markets spearheaded the offering process.
news.headline: Avenue Living closes $250M unsecured notes offering, maturing May 2030, led by RBC Capital Markets.

news.summary: NASHVILLE, Tenn., June 12, 2025 - Ryman Hospitality Properties, Inc., a prominent real estate investment trust focusing on high-end convention center resorts and entertainment offerings, revealed plans to disclose its second quarter 2025 earnings post-market closure on Monday, August 4, 2025. The management will host a conference call to analyze the results at 10 a.m. ET on Tuesday, August 5, 2025. The company trades on the NYSE as RHP.
news.headline: Ryman Hospitality Properties to release Q2 2025 earnings on August 4, with earnings conference call on August 5 at 10 a.m. ET.

news.summary: On May 12, 2025, Heritage Commerce Corp (NASDAQ: HTBK) revealed that Kroll Bond Rating Agency, LLC ("KBRA") has upheld the Company’s ratings. KBRA affirmed the Company's senior unsecured debt rating at BBB+, subordinated debt rating at BBB, and short-term debt rating at K2. The agency also confirmed the Bank's deposit and senior unsecured debt ratings at A-, subordinated debt rating at BBB+, and short-term deposit and debt ratings at K2. Both the Company and the Bank received stable outlook grades for their long-term ratings on May 9, 2025.
news.headline: KBRA affirms Heritage Commerce Corp ratings: Senior unsecured debt BBB+, subordinated debt BBB, short-term debt K2. Bank ratings: A- for deposit, BBB+ for subordinated debt, K2 for short-term deposit and debt. Outlook stable.

news.summary: Today, in Bethesda, Maryland, Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NASDAQ: HST), the largest lodging real estate investment trust in the U.S., declared a $0.20 per share quarterly cash dividend. The dividend, approved by the board of directors, will be paid on July 15, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of June 30, 2025.
news.headline: Host Hotels & Resorts (NASDAQ: HST) declared a $0.20 per share quarterly cash dividend, payable on July 15 to shareholders as of June 30.

news.summary: VANCOUVER, BC - On June 12, 2025, Finning International Inc. (TSX: FTT) revealed that David Primrose, the current Executive Vice President and Chief Development Officer, has been appointed as the new Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer (CFO) by the Board of Directors. This change is effective immediately. Mr. Primrose, who will continue overseeing his existing business support roles, will now take on this crucial financial leadership position within the company.
news.headline: Finning names David Primrose as Executive VP & CFO. He was previously EVP and Chief Development Officer.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, Guardian Capital LP revised the record date and ex-dividend date for the cash distribution of Guardian Ultra-Short U.S. T-Bill Fund (TSX: GUTB.U) for the period ending May 31, 2025. The distribution of USD$0.1769 per unit will now be paid on May 30, 2025, to unitholders of record on May 23, 2025. The ex-dividend date is expected to be May 23, 2025. This update follows the initial announcement made on May 15, 2025.
news.headline: Guardian Capital revises distribution details for Guardian Ultra-Short U.S. T-Bill Fund. Distribution of USD$0.1769 on May 30, 2025.

news.summary: In a groundbreaking development, researchers have created a new diamond-silicon carbide material that could revolutionize thermal management in artificial intelligence (AI) and high-performance computing. This innovative material boasts impressive thermal conductivity, measuring approximately X times higher than traditional materials currently used in the industry. This advancement is significant due to its potential to enhance the performance and efficiency of AI systems and high-performance computers, which generate substantial heat during operation. Experts believe that the implementation of this diamond-silicon carbide material could mark a new era in thermal management technology, addressing the escalating demand for more effective cooling solutions in the rapidly evolving tech industry.
news.headline: Coherent unveils diamond-silicon carbide material for advanced thermal management in AI and HPC, targeting next-gen tech.

news.summary: Derek Bryson Park has been influential in the world of finance, contributing significantly to over $1.5 trillion in transactions. His impact has been felt across various sectors, from mortgage deals to market innovations.
news.headline: Derek Bryson Park's leadership contributed $1.5 trillion in transactions shaping modern finance.

news.summary: Last week, major stock market indexes saw an increase to significant levels following news about additional tariffs imposed by the Trump administration. Companies such as Palantir, Broadcom, and CrowdStrike were observed to be in favorable buying positions. However, Tesla and Nvidia experienced declines in their stock values. Dow Jones futures have recently dropped due to the implications of the new tariffs imposed by President Trump. Noteworthy figures include Palantir being in a buy zone, while Tesla and Nvidia faced setbacks in the market.
news.headline: Dow Jones futures drop due to new Trump tariffs. Palantir, Broadcom, and CrowdStrike in buy zone, while Tesla and Nvidia decline. Key levels reached last week.

news.summary: InterDigital, Inc., a company specializing in mobile, video, and AI technology research, based in Wilmington, Del., disclosed today that its Board of Directors has approved a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.60 per share on its common stock. The dividend is scheduled for payment on July 23, 2025, to shareholders of record as of July 9, 2025. This announcement was made on June 12, 2025.
news.headline: InterDigital declares quarterly cash dividend of $0.60 per share on common stock, payable on July 23, 2025 to shareholders.

news.summary: President Donald Trump is set to direct the Commerce Department to initiate a Section 232 probe.
news.headline: Trump will not provide tariff relief for the tech industry, instructing Commerce Dept to conduct a Section 232 investigation.

news.summary: Saskatoon, SK, June 12, 2025 - Draganfly Inc. (NASDAQ: DPRO) (CSE: DPRO) (FSE: 3U8A), a leading drone solutions and systems developer, has successfully completed its recent public offering of 5,500,000 units. Each unit, priced at US$2.50, comprised one common share and one warrant for an additional common share. The total gross proceeds from the offering amount to about US$13.75 million, excluding discounts and expenses. The warrants, exercisable immediately, have an exercise price of CA$5.0768 (approximately US$3.71) per share and will remain valid for five years from the date of issue.
news.headline: Draganfly closes US$13.75M public offering with 5.5M units sold at US$2.50 each, including common shares & warrants.

news.summary: On Monday, the Dow Jones experienced a slight decrease due to rising tensions between the U.S. and China. Palantir and Tesla neared buy points while Nucor saw a significant increase following the implementation of Trump's tariffs. The market was influenced by ongoing economic data. The post highlighted the downturn of Dow Jones amidst these tensions, alongside Nucor's surge and Tesla and Palantir's decline.
news.headline: Dow Jones dips on U.S.-China tensions with Nucor rising; Palantir and Tesla fall near buy points.

news.summary: Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. has successfully upsized its offering, pricing approximately $2.3 billion of senior notes, increased from the initial $2 billion. The company plans to use the net proceeds for various purposes, including funding tender offers for several types of senior notes, paying related fees and expenses, and potentially repaying outstanding debt. Any remaining proceeds may be temporarily invested.
news.headline: Teva upsized its senior notes offering to $2.3 billion, will use proceeds to repay debt and fund tender offers.

news.summary: Criticism is mounting against the Trump administration's recent move to impose fees on ships and suggest significant tariffs reaching triple digits on cargo handling equipment connected to China. The decision has sparked extensive backlash from various stakeholders and industry experts. The punitive measures target vessels and equipment involved in maritime trade with China amid ongoing trade tensions. The administration's actions have sparked concerns about potential economic ramifications and disruptions to global supply chains.
news.headline: Shippers criticize Trump admin for fees on ships and triple-digit duties on cargo from China.

news.summary: This announcement should not be released, published, or distributed in any jurisdiction where it is unlawful to do so. Please refer to the disclaimer below for further information.
news.headline: CIC Lyonnaise de Banque issues notice of early redemption for ISIN Code FR0000047789.

news.summary: On Monday, the Nasdaq saw slight gains amidst global challenges. Meta and multiple gold companies made significant advances, with Nvidia also hinting at a potential buy opportunity. Following a robust market close, Dow Jones futures declined. Meta particularly stood out by breaking out and experiencing a substantial boost.
news.headline: Dow Jones futures fall despite strong market close; Meta breaks out, goes nuclear; Nasdaq leads gains.

news.summary: The President of the United States, Donald Trump, asserts that trade talks will soon result in an agreement with China. However, officials in both Beijing and Washington are expressing skepticism regarding this claim.
news.headline: Trump optimistic about US-China trade deal, but doubts from Beijing and Washington officials.

news.summary: Xometry has recently revealed the refinancing of their convertible debt and successful closure of a $250 million offering of 0.75% convertible senior notes.
news.headline: Xometry refinances convertible debt, closes $250M 0.75% Senior Notes offering.

news.summary: gategroup Holding AG, along with its subsidiaries, has revealed the pricing of a new round of financing totaling EUR 675 million and a USD 500 million term loan. Additionally, a multicurrency revolving credit facility amounting to CHF 300 million has been secured. The new financing package will support the company's operations and future initiatives.
news.headline: gategroup announces pricing for new term loans and credit facility: EUR 675M term loan, USD 500M term loan, CHF 300M credit.
TRUMP: MY ENTIRE ADMINISTRATION HAS BEEN DIRECTED TO NEGOTIATE WITH IRAN

news.summary: Tomorrow, President Donald Trump is scheduled to meet with Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney to discuss trade and economic security. The meeting will include important discussions related to these issues.
news.headline: Trump and Carney to discuss trade and economic security, including USMCA, in a meeting tomorrow.
TRUMP: WE REMAIN COMMITTED TO A DIPLOMATIC RESOLUTION TO IRAN NUCLEAR ISSUE

news.summary: The stock market saw a varied performance with Meta Platforms entering a significant 20-year agreement with Constellation Energy, causing a rise in nuclear stocks. Additionally, Credo Technology and Dollar General posted strong earnings. The Dow Jones index experienced a decline while technology stocks gained momentum due to the Meta-Constellation deal, as reported by Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Dow Jones falls, tech stocks rise; Meta-Constellation 20-year deal boosts nuclear stocks; Credo Tech and Dollar General post earnings wins.

news.summary: DraftKings Inc. (Nasdaq: DKNG) has disclosed its decision to introduce a 50-cent transaction fee on every mobile and online sports wager made in Illinois through DraftKings Sportsbook, starting from September 1, 2025. This move by the company is in reaction to the recent tax hikes on sports betting, including those imposed by the Illinois state legislature, affecting wagers placed with licensed operators.
news.headline: DraftKings introducing 50-cent transaction fee on bets in Illinois due to tax increases; starts Sept 1, 2025.

news.summary: Inspira™ Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd., a leading company in life-support and diagnostic technologies, based in Ra'anana, Israel, disclosed on June 5, 2025, that it has expanded its production capacity for the FDA-approved INSPIRA™ ART100 system. This move comes in anticipation of an upcoming procurement agreement with a European governmental entity. This authority is currently in advanced negotiations with the company, driving Inspira to increase its output of the ART100 system to meet the anticipated demand. The company is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol IINN.
news.headline: Inspira Technologies increases ART100 system production for FDA-cleared capabilities; in talks with European authority.

news.summary: gategroup Holding AG has proudly revealed the effective pricing of its extensive refinancing arrangement, which includes two term loans totaling EUR 675 million and USD 500 million, each lasting 7 years, along with a CHF 300 million multicurrency revolving credit facility. This new financing, with a duration of 6.5 years, saw a high demand surpassing expectations. The pricing landed at the lower end of the anticipated range, showcasing the market's trust in gategroup's strategic approach and accomplishments.
news.headline: gategroup completes successful refinancing with EUR 675 million, USD 500 million term loans, and CHF 300 million credit facility, all oversubscribed.

news.summary: On Tuesday, the Nasdaq showed the highest strength among the major indexes. The stock market saw another win, with indexes performing well. Palantir demonstrated its leadership. Live coverage of these events was available.
news.headline: Nasdaq outperformed other indexes, Palantir shows leadership. Live coverage of stock market win. via @IBDinvestors

news.summary: Inspira™ Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd., a leading company in life-support and diagnostic technologies, based in Ra'anana, Israel, made a significant announcement on June 5, 2025. The company, listed on NASDAQ as IINN, revealed its plans to expand production capacity for its INSPIRA™ ART100 system, recently cleared by the U.S. FDA. This move comes as a response to anticipated high demand from a European governmental body, with whom the company is engaged in advanced procurement talks. The ART100 system, known for its innovative features, is at the center of these strategic expansion efforts.
news.headline: Inspira Technologies is increasing production of their ART100 system for European government, given advanced stage negotiations.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on June 12, 2025, FOBI AI Inc. (FOBI:TSXV) (FOBIF:OTCQB) has completed the sale of all shares in its German subsidiary, Fobi AI Germany GmbH, to an independent third-party buyer as per the share purchase agreement from May 28, 2025. This transaction follows the previous announcement made by the company on the same date. This strategic move signifies a shift in FOBI AI's operations, aiming to enhance its focus on core business activities. The sale marks a significant milestone for FOBI AI, showcasing its commitment to refining its business structure and maximizing operational efficiencies.
news.headline: FOBI AI Inc. sells German subsidiary, Fobi AI Germany GmbH, to third party purchaser on May 28, 2025.

news.summary: Key stock market levels were surpassed, with Nvidia entering a buy zone. Elon Musk, Tesla's CEO, criticized the Trump budget as an "abomination." CrowdStrike experienced a late decrease. Dow Jones Futures saw an increase, with CrowdStrike leading early movers. The market crossed resistance levels.
news.headline: Dow Jones Futures rise, CrowdStrike leads movers, market tops resistance. Nvidia buy zone, Tesla CEO on Trump budget. CrowdStrike tumbled late.

news.summary: Bunker Hill Mining Corp. has successfully closed two private placements, raising a total of approximately US$6.2 million in cash and US$4.4 million through debt settlement in the Brokered Private Placement. Additionally, the Company closed a Teck Private Placement for approximately US$20.5 million. In total, they issued 252,215,751 Units at a price of C$0.15 each, with Teck acquiring 195,294,655 Units and a syndicate of agents led by BMO Capital Markets, CIBC Capital Markets, and Red Cloud Securities Inc. acquiring the remaining Units. Sprott Streaming participated in both placements, acquiring 10,000,000 Units.
news.headline: Bunker Hill closed $31 million financings with Sprott and Teck, issuing 252 million units at C$0.15 each.

news.summary: Hapbee has provided an update on the status of their audited financial statements. The company has released the latest figures regarding its financial performance. This move comes as part of Hapbee's commitment to transparency and regulatory compliance. Investors and stakeholders can now access important financial information including revenue, expenses, and profits. The audited financial statements have undergone a thorough review process to ensure accuracy and reliability. This update is significant as it provides a comprehensive overview of Hapbee's financial health and stability.
news.headline: Hapbee is upgrading to OTCID for better investor access and market visibility. Also updating audited financial statements.

news.summary: Wilmington-based company Onto Innovation Inc. (NYSE: ONTO) has recently appointed Brian Roberts as the new chief financial officer and Shirley Chen as the senior vice president of customer success. This move aims to bolster the company's leadership team as they work towards achieving their strategic goals. Both Roberts and Chen will officially assume their roles on June 16, 2025. Highlighting the rapid pace of the semiconductor industry on a global scale, Mike Plisi emphasized the importance of these appointments to drive the company's growth.
news.headline: Onto Innovation appoints Brian Roberts as CFO and Shirley Chen as SVP of Customer Success, effective June 16, 2025.

news.summary: Stark Flight, a leading innovator in agricultural drones, has unveiled its state-of-the-art drone platform in New York City. This advanced technology aims to revolutionize farming by providing unmatched precision, cost-effectiveness, and environmental advantages. The new platform is tailored to assist farmers, agribusinesses, and researchers in enhancing crop management, reducing expenses, and encouraging sustainable practices amidst growing agricultural demands. With the global agricultural drone sector estimated to hit $10.2 billion by 2030, the platform is geared towards meeting the demand for efficient resource utilization and increased crop production. Stark Flight's cutting-edge solution combines drone technology with advanced sensors, radar, and automated flight systems to tackle these challenges head-on. In contrast to traditional farming techniques like tractors and crop-dusting planes, these drones offer precision, flexibility, and data-driven insights, positioning them as an indispensable asset in modern agriculture.
news.headline: Stark Flight launches advanced agricultural drones to improve farm efficiency and sustainability, seizing a portion of the growing $10.2 billion market by 2030.

news.summary: A recent study revealed that the global obesity rate has reached a record high, with over 2 billion adults now classified as overweight or obese. The research found that obesity has tripled worldwide since 1975, with approximately 650 million adults and 340 million children falling into the obese category. This alarming trend is attributed to factors such as unhealthy diets, sedentary lifestyles, and lack of access to healthcare. Experts warn that if this pattern continues, the number of overweight individuals could surpass 5 billion by 2025. The study also highlighted significant disparities between regions, with the highest obesity rates found in North America and Europe. Addressing this issue will require coordinated efforts from governments, healthcare providers, and individuals to promote better nutrition and encourage more physical activity in order to combat this growing public health crisis.
news.headline: Trade tensions eased as US and China agreed to halt steep tariffs, reducing economic strain.

news.summary: On Thursday, the Nasdaq experienced the most significant decline among major indexes. Palantir saw a sharp drop in its stock value. The stock market today displayed losses across all indexes, with Tesla performing poorly. Live coverage of the market activity was provided by Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Stock market indexes show red overall, with Nasdaq selling off the hardest. Palantir stock sank. Tesla also crumbled.

news.summary: Refresco has recently revealed its acquisition of Telemark Kildevann, a prominent beverage manufacturer based in Norway. This acquisition is significant as it further solidifies Refresco's position in the industry. Telemark Kildevann is well-known for its high-quality beverages and this deal is valued at approximately [insert amount] dollars. This move is expected to enhance Refresco's product offerings and market presence in the Scandinavian region.
news.headline: Refresco acquires Telemark Kildevann, a top Norwegian beverage manufacturer.

news.summary: On June 6, 2025, BE Resources Inc. (TSX-V: BER.H) disclosed that following their previous press release from March 6, 2025, they have successfully resolved C$361,361.23 in debt with specific creditors by issuing 5,559,399 common shares at a set price of C$0.065 per share. This settlement, known as the Debt Settlement, is aimed at aiding the Company in maintaining cash reserves for operational needs, helping to bolster their working capital.
news.headline: BE Resources settled C$361,361.23 debt with 5,559,399 shares at C$0.065 per Share, preserving cash for working capital.

news.summary: MedX Health Corp., based in Mississauga, Ontario, has disclosed that they have enlisted Red Cloud Securities Inc. to offer market making services. As per the deal, Red Cloud will receive a fixed monthly fee of $5,000, starting from June 15, 2025, to September 15, 2025, paid upfront in cash. The arrangement will persist on a monthly basis beyond the initial period. The contract allows for termination by either party.
news.headline: MedX hires Red Cloud for market making services, paying $5,000 monthly starting June 15, 2025.

news.summary: Stock futures experienced an increase as investors awaited earnings reports. Following a dip on Thursday amidst the Elon Musk-President Trump dispute, Tesla's stock rebounded. Broadcom emerged as a top performer in terms of earnings. In addition, Dow Jones futures saw a rise, with hopes of a potential truce between Musk and Trump boosting Tesla's stock. Furthermore, the upcoming jobs report was highly anticipated by investors.
news.headline: Dow Jones futures up; Tesla rebounds post Musk-Trump feud; jobs report awaited. Broadcom leads earnings movers.
